__TRANSLATE_11__: No jargon. No acronyms. Just a clear, honest explanation of what this thing does and why you might care.
__TRANSLATE_15__: You know how your phone has Siri or Google Assistant? Hermes is like that — but it runs on
__TRANSLATE_18__: smartest AI models in the world
__TRANSLATE_21__: across every conversation. You own it. It works the way you want.
__TRANSLATE_22__: Imagine hiring a really clever assistant who never forgets anything you've told them, can work while you sleep by checking things on a schedule, and can reach you on WhatsApp, Telegram, email — wherever you are. That's Hermes.
__TRANSLATE_25__: One diagram to rule them all. No PhD required.
__TRANSLATE_28__: What happens when you use it
__TRANSLATE_29__: A typical conversation, broken down into plain English.
__TRANSLATE_31__: You type a message — or speak, or send it via Telegram — asking Hermes to do something. "Summarise my emails." "Write me a Python script." "What's the weather in Tokyo?"
__TRANSLATE_33__: Before answering, Hermes looks up what it knows about you — your preferences, past conversations, files you've shared, tasks you've set. It doesn't start from zero every time.
__TRANSLATE_34__: It picks the best AI model and gets to work
__TRANSLATE_35__: Hermes sends your request to a powerful AI model (Claude, GPT, Gemini — you choose). The model reasons through the answer, uses tools if needed (searching the web, running code), and drafts a reply.
__TRANSLATE_36__: You get the answer, wherever you are
__TRANSLATE_37__: The reply lands in whatever app you're already using. Telegram, Discord, your browser — Hermes meets you where you are. No app switching required.
__TRANSLATE_38__: It saves what matters and keeps going
__TRANSLATE_39__: Hermes updates its memory with anything worth keeping. If you set a recurring task ("check my portfolio every morning"), it runs that on a schedule — even while you sleep.
__TRANSLATE_40__: The three things that make it special
__TRANSLATE_42__: Good question. Here's what Hermes does that standalone AI chat apps don't.
__TRANSLATE_44__: Most AI forgets everything the moment you close the tab. Hermes keeps a persistent memory of who you are and what you care about — across every conversation, forever.
__TRANSLATE_46__: You can schedule tasks. "Check Hacker News every morning and tell me the three most interesting posts." Hermes does it automatically. No reminders, no opening an app.
__TRANSLATE_48__: Telegram, Discord, WhatsApp, email — Hermes talks to you in whatever app you already live in. One assistant, everywhere you are.
__TRANSLATE_50__: Not just talk — it can run code, search the web, edit files, call APIs. Hermes has tools. Real tools. It's a full agent, not just a chatbot.
__TRANSLATE_52__: Hermes lives on your own computer. Your conversations stay private. You control what AI model it uses and where your data goes. No company owns your history.
__TRANSLATE_54__: Claude, GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek — bring your own API keys and use whichever model you like best. Switch anytime. No vendor lock-in.

__TRANSLATE_59__: Open ChatGPT. Re-explain who you are. Again.
__TRANSLATE_60__: Switch between 5 different apps to check things.
__TRANSLATE_61__: Remember to run the boring repetitive tasks yourself.
__TRANSLATE_62__: Lose your conversation history when you close the tab.
__TRANSLATE_63__: Your data sitting on someone else's servers.
__TRANSLATE_64__: Locked into one AI company's model forever.
__TRANSLATE_66__: It already knows you. No re-introductions.
__TRANSLATE_67__: One assistant across Telegram, Discord, browser, email.
__TRANSLATE_68__: Scheduled tasks run themselves while you sleep.
__TRANSLATE_70__: Your machine. Your data. Fully private.
__TRANSLATE_71__: Switch models anytime — Claude today, GPT tomorrow.
__TRANSLATE_72__: Hermes is a personal AI agent that runs on your computer, remembers everything, works on a schedule, reaches you anywhere, and lets you choose whatever AI brain you want.
